package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepeatedBodyRewindForMultipleDecoders() string {
    ruleID := "repeated_body_rewind_for_multiple_decoders"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Gin handlers that read, rewind, and decode the same request body multiple times."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
